title: schizachyrium sericatum
intro: Schizachyrium sericatum, also known as Little Bluestem, is a perennial grass native to North America and is characterized by its blue-green foliage and feathery plumes. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various skin conditions, such as eczema and dermatitis, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Schizachyrium sericatum include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used topically or internally to harness its medicinal benefits.
